description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo:latest Docker image and sets GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Define a pages job in the deploy stage that runs the command 'hugo', publishes the 'public' folder as a Pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. Define a test job in the test stage that also runs 'hugo' but is excluded from the master branch. No services, caches, or additional variables are needed.
